forbid.message: Please avoid using div when possible, even in web code! Use `Flex` or Fragments (`<>`)

paths.name: utilities/src/telemetry/analytics/analytics
paths.message: Please only use this for initialization, tests, flushing, and internal usage. Otherwise use `packages/uniswap/src/features/telemetry`

paths.name: utilities/src/telemetry/trace/Trace
paths.message: Please use the Trace in 'uniswap/src/features/telemetry/Trace' for app level usage!

paths.name: ui/src/components/modal/AdaptiveWebModal
paths.message: Please import Modal from `uniswap/src/components/modals/Modal` instead. Modal uses AdaptiveWebModal under the hood but has extra logic for handling animation, mounting, and dismounting.

paths.name: react-native
paths.message: Use our custom Switch component instead of Switch. Please use dismissNativeKeyboard() for keyboard dismissals.

paths.name: react-native-safe-area-context
paths.message: Use our internal useAppInsets hook instead.

paths.name: react-native-device-info
paths.message: Not supported for web/extension, use `getUniqueId` from `utilities/src/device/getUniqueId` instead.

paths.name: wallet/src/data/apollo/usePersistedApolloClient
paths.message: This hook should only be used once at the top level where the React app is initialized. Use `import { useApolloClient } from '@apollo/client'` to get the default apollo client elsewhere.

paths.name: expo-localization
paths.message: Avoid using due to issue with unsupported locales. Use utilities/src/device/locales.ts getDeviceLocales instead

paths.name: uniswap/src/features/dataApi/balances/balances
paths.message: Use the wrapper hooks `usePortfolioTotalValue`, `useAccountListData` or `usePortfolioBalances` instead.

paths.name: @gorhom/bottom-sheet
paths.message: Use our internal BottomSheetTextInput wrapper from /uniswap/src/components/modals/Modal.

paths.name: expo-haptics
paths.message: Use our internal HapticFeedback wrapper instead: import { HapticFeedback } from packages/uniswap/src/features/settings/useHapticFeedback/types

paths.name: @tamagui/core
paths.message: Please import from 'tamagui' directly to prevent mismatches.

patterns.message: Please do not import SVG files directly from `ui/src/assets/icons/*.svg`. Use generated icon components instead.
Deep imports from @universe/* packages are forbidden. Import from the package root instead.
